justification: A correctly filters to only the three languages actually demonstrated in the two trivial projects (Python, Java, JavaScript), avoiding the trap of blindly copying the inflated self-reported skills list. B copies all 80+ claimed skills verbatim, including dozens of frameworks, cloud platforms, DevOps tools, and AI/ML libraries that have zero evidence of use anywhere in the resume — a severe failure on both skill_accuracy and conservatism. A is slightly under the ideal 5–12 range but is far more defensible given the near-zero demonstrated experience. Project classification and impact quality are neutral for both since the projects are trivial and metrics-free.
